title: cynoglossum officinale var. bicolor
intro: Cynoglossum officinale var. bicolor, also known as Chinese forget-me-not or two-colored forked tongue, is a flowering plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Cynoglossum officinale var. bicolor include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities, making it a valuable herb for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to enhance its therapeutic effects.
